modmenu.summaryTranslation.seamlesssleep: Smooth, synchronized sleep transition with visual tweaks.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.seamlesss: Adds a synced sleep animation, softer overlays, and optional chat dimming so passing the night feels better in multiplayer.
config.seamlesssleep.title: Seamless Sleep
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.chat_text_opa: Multiplier applied to chat text opacity when you are in bed.
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.chat_backgrou: Multiplier applied to chat background opacity when you are in bed.
